untranslatable_reason: Cup and Handle pattern requires shape-based pattern recognition (U-shaped formation, cup high at point A, cup low at point B, inner cup identification) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price and technical indicators. The pattern involves multi-bar lookback logic to identify specific relative highs/lows and geometric relationships that exceed the capabilities of point-in-time indicator comparisons. A pattern detector or custom shape-recognition function would be required.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using Donchian Channel breakout (dc_upper) as a proxy for cup rim breakout, with SMA_20 crossover as reversal exit. However, this does not capture the core cup-and-handle geometry, the two measure rule calculation (cup_height = right_high - cup_low, target = cup_height + right_cup_lip), or the inner cup variant specification. Manual pattern detection or a dedicated shape-recognition module is required.
